title: bauhinia corymbosa
intro: Bauhinia corymbosa, also known as the white orchid tree or pink orchid tree, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. Bauhinia corymbosa is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic formulations.
